tasks.instruction: Sign up as Ada Lovelace with email ada@example.com and report the confirmation message
Find the price of the Super Widget
Find out which year the company was founded and in which city
Fill in the form: set the Name field to Ada Lovelace and the Description field to 'Mathematician and first programmer', then submit. Report the confirmation message shown after submitting.

On this React Hook Form documentation page, find the Bug Report form. Fill the Bug Title (name) field with 'Login button unresponsive' and the Description field with 'The login button does nothing when clicked on mobile Safari', then submit the form. Report whether the form submitted successfully and any confirmation or validation message.
